mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.username AS author_name, p.title AS poem_title FROM poem_annotation a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN poem p ON a.poem_id = p.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, u.username AS author_name, p.title AS poem_title FROM poem_annotation a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.author_id = u.id LEFT JOIN poem p ON a.poem_id = p.id WHERE a.poem_id = #{poemId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO poem_annotation (poem_id, title, content, author_id) VALUES (#{poemId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE poem_annotation SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
